name: Malted Milk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Semi-sweet chocolate chips (12 oz./2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and softened butter. Stir in baking soda, eggs, sweetened condensed milk, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Gradually mix in flour, malted milk powder, and brown sugar until just combined.
4. Fold in chocolate chips.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake 12-15 minutes at 300°F in the center rack of the oven.
Yield: About 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
